title: foxglove.Event
description: A discrete event that occurred at a specific time. An event may have zero duration (instantaneous) or a non-zero duration.

duration.title: duration
duration.description: Duration of the event. If absent or zero, the event is an instantaneous point marker.

event_type.description: Category name matching a platform event type (e.g. "FAULT", "MANEUVER"). Used for filtering and grouping.

items.title: foxglove.EventProperty
items.description: A typed property value on an event, matching the platform's structured properties model

value.description: String-encoded value. Interpretation depends on type.

event_properties.description: Typed property values matching the platform's structured properties model

items.title: foxglove.KeyValuePair
items.description: A key with its associated value

metadata.description: Unstructured key-value metadata, complementary to event_properties. Keys must be unique.

display_name.description: Short human-readable label shown on the timeline marker

color.description: Hex color string (e.g. "#FF5733" or "#FF573380"). If absent the player assigns a default color.

id.description: Stable identity for deduplication during platform ingestion. If absent the platform may compute a fingerprint.

device_id.description: Platform device ID this event is associated with. If absent during ingestion, inferred from upload context.
